reach_why: Mostly extends familiar fallibilist critiques of confidence, filtering, and pseudo-understanding rather than opening new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links model confidence, conservative selection, contamination, and partial control into one epistemic failure pattern.
falsifiable_why: Claims can be tested by comparing filter regimes, confidence calibration, disruption effects, and breakthrough suppression rates.
explanation: Orderly selection can mask fragile, biased inquiry that yields control without understanding.
